items.title: Jaylen Brown just did a Twitch stream. Said he was still processing the trade, called VJ Edgecombe and Tyrese Maxey (both picked up), said he was looking forward to meeting AI (and professed his love for the black jerseys) and said…
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Jaylen Brown just did a Twitch stream. Said he was still processing the trade, called VJ Edgecombe and Tyrese Maxey (both picked up), said he was looking forward to meeting AI (and professed his love for the black jerseys) and said… 

“The Process is back, motherfuckers.”

items.title: Well that was quite a time on the fchwpo stream
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Well that was quite a time on the fchwpo stream

And I'm quite sure there wasn't a single Jayson Tatum mention the whole time

items.title: In the 61-year-old Donovan, Spurs pick up a top lieutenant with a wealth of experience as a head coach, including spending the past 11 seasons guiding NBA teams.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
In the 61-year-old Donovan, Spurs pick up a top lieutenant with a wealth of experience as a head coach, including spending the past 11 seasons guiding NBA teams.

And, of course, there’s his long stint with Florida and those consecutive national titles.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Billy Donovan agrees to join Spurs as coach Mitch Johnson's lead assistant
media.description: A league source confirmed Donovan plans to move to San Antonio after spending the last 11 seasons as an NBA head coach.

items.body_excerpt: Jaylen Brown is headed to Philadelphia, ending the JB and JT era in Boston just two years after the Celtics won a championship. The crew reacts in real time to the trade, question how Boston handled its Finals MVP, and debate whether the Celtics exposed their hand by dangling…

items.title: The Rockets like to do flat and descending structured contracts. I'll project Tari Eason with a $19 million starting salary until we get confirmation, which is the highest they could give him with these terms.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Rockets like to do flat and descending structured contracts. I'll project Tari Eason with a $19 million starting salary until we get confirmation, which is the highest they could give him with these terms.

They'd have enough room to add two minimums under the second apron.
